scope: Minimal viable todo app with web frontend and RESTful API using in-memory storage. Features: add, list, toggle completion, edit, delete tasks, clear completed, task counter, and basic validation.
acceptanceCriteria: User can add a task via text input and submit button
User can view all tasks in a single list
User can toggle task completion status via checkbox
User can edit task text inline
User can clear all completed tasks
Task counter displays total, remaining, and completed counts
qaChecks: Empty task submission is rejected with clear error message
Task state updates reflect immediately in UI without page reload
Clear completed removes only completed tasks
Task counter accurately reflects current state after any operation
taskBreakdown: Set up monorepo structure (packages/web, packages/api) with build configuration
Implement API endpoints (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /tasks, POST /tasks/clear) with in-memory storage
Build web frontend with task list UI and wire API integration
definitionOfDone: All acceptance criteria met, all QA checks passing, code reviewed against spec, and features verified in modern browser.
